title: erysimum altum
intro: Erysimum altum, also known as alpine wallflower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial activities, which can help protect against oxidative stress and infections. Erysimum altum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to relieve coughs and respiratory discomfort.
